title: grammitis hirtelloides
intro: Grammitis hirtelloides, also known as the hirsute grammitis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. Grammitis hirtelloides has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
